"Test Plan", plan_url="https://github.com/test/repo/issues/123", pr_number=456, pr_url="https://github.com/test/repo/pull/456", pr_state="OPEN", run_url="https://github.com/test/repo/actions/runs/789", ) ctx = CommandContext(row=row, view_mode=ViewMode.PLANS) screen = LaunchScreen(ctx=ctx)

session.assistant:
## CI Check Results
Here's a summary of all fast CI checks:
### ruff check **Status: PASSED** - All linting checks passed
### ruff format --check **Status: PASSED** - 1599 files already formatted
### prettier --check (markdown/yaml) **Status: FAILED** - Code style issues found in 2 files: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
### ty check **Status: PASSED** - All type checks passed
### pytest (unit tests only, excluding integration) **Status: FAILED** - Total: 6454 tests collected - Failures: 18 tests failed - Passed: 6436 tests passed
**Failed tests (18 total):**
1. **tests/cli/commands/split/test_plan.py::test_execute_split_plan_creates_worktrees** - Error: `AttributeError: 'FakeGit' object has no attribute 'worktree'`
2. **tests/cli/commands/split/test_plan.py::test_execute_split_plan_with_noop_ops** - Error: `AttributeError: 'MockDryRunGit' object has no attribute 'worktree'`
3. **tests/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/test_real_routing.py** (4 tests) - Tests: test_routes_to_objective_service_when_erk_objective_label_present, test_routes_to_plan_service_when_erk_objective_label_absent, test_routes_to_plan_service_for_learn_plans, test_routes_to_plan_service_for_multi_label_query, test_condition_inverts_correctly_objective_vs_plan - Error: `TypeError: '>' not supported between instances of 'MagicMock' and 'int'`
4. **tests/shared/github/test_metadata_schemas.py** (4 tests) - Tests: TestWorktreeCreationSchema::test_invalid_issue_number_type, test_negative_issue_number, TestPlanSchema::test_invalid_issue_number_type, test_zero_issue_number - Error: Assertion failures - expecting 'issue_number' in error messages but getting 'plan_number'
5. **tests/tui/app/test_async_operations.py** (2 tests) - Tests: TestCmuxFocusWorkspace::test_focus_selects_matching_workspace, test_focus_no_match_skips_select - Error: `assert 0 == 2` and `assert 0 == 1` - list assertions failing
6. **tests/tui/data/test_provider.py** (2 tests) - Tests: TestBlockingDepsPlans::test_next_node_own_pr_collected, test_next_node_own_pr_not_duplicated_with_dep_pr - Error: `AttributeError: 'PlanRowData' object has no attribute 'objective_head_plans'`
7. **tests/tui/screens/test_launch_screen.py** (2 tests) - Tests: test_launch_screen_builds_key_mapping_for_plan_view, test_launch_screen_maps_command_ids_correctly - Error: Missing key 'f' in command mapping
8. **tests/tui/views/test_types.py::TestViewConfig::test_learn_view_config** - Error: `AssertionError: assert ('erk-learn',) == ('erk-plan', 'erk-learn')`
